changeSet.author: tanisha

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE() AND routine_name = 'sp_get_customer_loyalty_summary' AND routine_type = 'PROCEDURE'

changeSet.sql: CREATE PROCEDURE sp_get_customer_loyalty_summary(IN customerId VARCHAR(255)) BEGIN SELECT customer_id, loyalty_tier, points_balance, total_spent, member_since, last_activity_date, referral_count, cashback_earned, reward_expiry_date FROM customer_loyalty WHERE customer_id = customerId; END;
